title: Section 15
content: 1[(1) Every member of the Force shall, for the purposes of this Act, be considered to be always on duty, and shall, at any time, be liable to be employed at any place within India.] (2) No 2* * * member of the Force shall engage himself in any employment or office other than his duties under this Act.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 60 of 1985, s. 12, for sub-section (1) (w.e.f. 20-9-1985). 2. The words "superior officer or" omitted by Act 60 of 1985, s. 12 (w.e.f. 20-9-1985).
